description.content: JWT access token from login
Resolved JWT token for authenticated requests
AT Protocol handle for actor resolution tests
AT URI for likes/comments
DID for moderation label tests
URI of created comment (set during run)
ID of created moderation label (set during run)

ATProto (BlueSky) social graph and moderation API E2E tests.

Covers all 17 endpoints under /api/v1/social/*:
- Actor resolution and statistics (public)
- Social graph: followers, following (public reads, authenticated writes)
- Likes: create, delete, list
- Comments: create, get, thread, delete
- Moderation: apply label, get labels, remove label
- Feed ingest from ATProto PDS

**IPFS note:** IPFS-backed avatar uploads are exercised by the auth endpoints
(PUT /api/v1/users/me/avatar). Those requests pass avatarUrl which may be
resolved via IPFS if an IPFS gateway is configured. To exercise the full IPFS
path, set IPFS_GATEWAY in the server environment and upload an avatar using
the athena-auth collection. The IPFS CID is returned in the response.

**ATProto Go test coverage:** PublishVideo, PublishComment, and PublishVideoBatch
are covered by unit tests in internal/usecase/atproto_features_test.go with a
mocked PDS HTTP server. Those tests pass without an external ATProto PDS.

Returns 404 if handle is not found in the ATProto PDS.
